claimText: The Global Outlook Council on Water was launched by the President of South Africa.
evidenceExcerpt: The President of South Africa announced its launch
examUse: Statement-based question on the origin and launching authority of international water initiatives.
distractorHooks: Launched by the UN Environment Programme (UNEP)
Launched by the President of India

claimText: The Global Outlook Council on Water was established as a G20 Presidential Legacy Initiative.
evidenceExcerpt: announced its launch as a G20 Presidential Legacy Initiative.
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the parent framework of the initiative.
